description: Build state validation for the two-hop flow. The server must reject: (1) lens_review_complete called without a valid reviewId from lens_review_start, (2) missing lens results (agent skipped a lens that was in the agents array), (3) lens output that fails Zod schema validation (agent sent malformed results), (4) duplicate reviewId submission. State transitions: not_started -> started -> complete. Store state in session cache keyed by reviewId.
title: Review session state machine -- enforce hop ordering and completeness
